title: The role of AI in Cybereconomy | Artem Kotelskiy at Agentic Zero
description: Artem from cyber Fund presents "cyber economy": a self-regulating, hyper-efficient system succeeding capitalism. The fund invested in 200+ startups in Ethereum and Solana. Their thesis: AI enhances market rationality by improving discovery, cognition, coordination, and action. It "instruments" previously inaccessible markets through intents, creating an "intent economy" with generative markets. In this talk Artem outlines its key needs: mechanism-aware AI, neutral blockchains, and privacy infrastructure.
